content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 22, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 22, 2026, focused on stabilizing authentication infrastructure and refining AI pricing logic. Key achievements include migrating authorization flows to Steward, implementing native wallet login buttons, and resolving billing lookup errors for image-generation models.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Authentication and Identity Management**
*   Migrated the `/app-auth/authorize` page from Privy to Steward, ensuring independent authentication functionality ([#466](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/466)).
*   Consolidated auth improvements, including the introduction of native Ethereum and Solana login buttons and fixes for journal drift and session refresh logic ([#469](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/469)).

**AI Pricing and Billing Logic**
*   Resolved a billing lookup failure where image-generation models were incorrectly classified, preventing proper resolution of language input/output pricing ([#470](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/470)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#471](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/471): fix(auth): send tenant_id (snake_case) to Steward oauth authorize.
*   [#468](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/468): fix(auth): preempt steward session expiry with eager refresh (server + client).
*   [#467](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/467): fix(db): repair _journal.json drift causing silent migration skips.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
